title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, Deno and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama; use any local model as an LLM, chat, or embedding backend.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now named Open WebUI); chat like ChatGPT with your local models.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, streaming, embeddings, tools and JSON mode support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple interface to chat, generate and manage models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI chat client with syntax highlighting, history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for Ollama: PDF chat, voice bots, function calling, RAG, fine-tuning, etc.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing reproducible Ollama binaries and development shells for macOS/Linux.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU, CUDA, ROCm) and compose examples for Ollama.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter that exposes Ollama endpoints with auth, rate-limit, and OpenAI-compatible routes.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-maintained Rust crate for Ollama; async/tokio, strong typing, streaming support.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama; small surface, idiomatic error handling, context cancelation.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to spin up Ollama services in CI/CD pipelines for integration testing.

title: ollama-github-action
summary: GitHub Action that installs Ollama and pre-pulls models for fast CI jobs.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repo tracking community SDKs for C#, Dart, Swift, PHP, Elixir and more.
